macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: US Regulators Clarify Crypto Asset Classification, Boosting Bitcoin and Ethereum
items.summary: U.S. regulators have adopted a clearer stance on crypto asset classification, reducing uncertainty, aiding institutional entry, and favoring high-quality assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum over speculative altcoins. This shift is driving capital redistribution and intensifying competition among infrastructure cryptocurrencies.

items.title: Crypto Market Crashes on Geopolitical Tensions, Hot PPI Data, and Fed Rate Stance
items.summary: The global crypto market dropped sharply with Bitcoin falling nearly 5% to $70,600, Ethereum 6% to $2,187, amid Middle East tensions, hotter-than-expected U.S. PPI, and Fed Chair Powell signaling no imminent rate cuts, triggering $481 million in long liquidations.

items.title: Bitcoin Price Drops to $69,370 Amid Market Sell-Off
items.summary: Bitcoin's price fell to $69,370.14 at 9:45 a.m. ET, down $3,113 from yesterday and lower than a year ago, influenced by investor speculation and broader market pressures.

items.title: Ethereum Falls to $2,121 as Recession Fears and Vitalik Buterin Sale Weigh
items.summary: Ethereum's price dropped to $2,121.76, down $117 from yesterday, amid early 2026 recession fears and news of co-founder Vitalik Buterin selling millions in ETH, highlighting its volatility.

items.title: Bitcoin Bulls Fading Late Week on Daily Chart
items.summary: April Bitcoin futures prices declined in early U.S. trading on March 19, with technical analysis showing bulls losing momentum as the daily chart uptrend weakens.

items.title: Market Sell-Off Shifts Investor Focus to Utility-Driven Tokens
items.summary: Amid the crypto market sell-off, investors are pivoting to cryptocurrencies with real utility and ecosystem strength, moving away from speculative assets.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Moonshot AI Introduces Attention Residuals Boosting LLM Training Efficiency by 25%
items.summary: Moonshot AI's 'Attention Residuals' replaces static residual connections with dynamic attention in the depth dimension, achieving performance equivalent to 1.25x baseline compute while addressing PreNorm dilution; praised by Elon Musk and OpenAI's Jerry Tworek as 'Deep Learning 2.0'. Includes Block AttnRes for memory-efficient large-scale training.

items.title: OpenAI Launches Research Challenge for Efficient Pretrained Models
items.summary: OpenAI's competition requires creating the most efficient pretrained model on FineWeb dataset within 16MB size limit and 10-minute training on eight H100 GPUs, pushing boundaries of compact AI models.

items.title: Oshkosh Corporation Unveils AI-Enabled Material Contamination Detection
items.summary: Oshkosh introduces AI technology developed by McNeilus for detecting material contamination, enhancing industrial quality control processes.

items.title: UKRI Opens £3M Funding for Frontier AI Champions Phase One
items.summary: Innovate UK launches grants totaling £3,000,000 for AI champions focusing on frontier AI development, with applications now open.

items.title: AI in Industry 4.0 Market to Reach $14.27B in 2026, Growing at 26.2% CAGR
items.summary: The AI in Industry 4.0 market is projected to grow from $11.3B in 2025 to $14.27B in 2026, driven by automation, IoT, and predictive maintenance, reaching $36.5B by 2030.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Tait Communications Launches OpenTrunk Shared Control Channel Solution
items.summary: Tait Communications announced the Tait OpenTrunk shared control channel solution based on DMR Tier 3 technology for spectrum-constrained organizations. The solution, showcased at IWCE 2026 in Las Vegas, is available April 1 and allows multiple organizations to share the same frequency.

items.title: IONNA EV Charging Network Reaches 100+ Live Sites Milestone
items.summary: IONNA, the EV charging joint venture of eight leading automakers, celebrated its second anniversary by reaching over 100 live charging sites and launching its first automaker discount program with General Motors. The network also announced new convenience store locations using Amazon's Just Walk Out technology.

items.title: GA Drilling Secures $44.1 Million for Deep Geothermal Technology
items.summary: GA Drilling secured $44.1 million in funding to commercialize NexTitan, a breakthrough deep geothermal drilling technology designed to transform energy infrastructure. The investment is backed by strategic industrial partners including a major drilling contractor.

items.title: Software-Defined Vehicle Forum Convenes in Shanghai
items.summary: The 7th Software-Defined Vehicle Forum & AUTOSAR China Day 2026 drew over 600 attendees in Jiading District to discuss automotive software integration and launched the 'Common Source, Shared Chain' initiative for cross-industry technological synergy. The event highlighted Jiading's development as an innovation hub for intelligent connected vehicles.
